results.rendered_html: abhimanas (abhi + manas) adj. dessen Geist auf Etwas gerichtet ist, strebend, verlangend nach; am Ende eines comp.: dharmābhi˚  R. 2,34,32 . yuddhābhi˚ 5,38,24 . = sacetas Sch. zu  BHAṬṬ. 5,73 .

results.rendered_html:
abhimanas a. Intent on, desirous of, anxious, longing for; bhavatobhimanāḥ
(pb) samīhate saruṣaḥ kartumupetya mānanāṃ  Śi. 16. 2  (where a˚ also means undaunted, of fearless mind).
